prompt:
Using the provided reference image as the base photo, transform it into a high-energy editorial rising-star poster for LILIDI. Keep the woman and the Palais Royal fountain setting recognizable, but crop to a vertical poster composition and add bold sports-card/founder-card graphic treatment.

Poster design: Add large distressed white uppercase headline text “LILIDI” across the top, partially behind/around the subject. Overlay dynamic diagonal brush strokes and paint splashes in deep purple, magenta, orange, white, and black, framing the subject without hiding her outfit. Add halftone texture, grunge speckles, ink splatters, and sharp editorial contrast.

Text elements: Include exactly 5 visible text blocks: 1) top headline “LILIDI”, 2) a magenta brush-label on the upper right reading “FOUNDER” with “PARIS · 2026” below it, 3) vertical left-side serif text “L’IA HONNÊTE”, 4) bottom-left tagline “EVERY MODEL. ONE PLATFORM.”, and 5) bottom-right signature-style name with “#001”.

Additional graphics: Place a small glossy app-like gradient flower/logo icon in the top-right corner. Add a handwritten signature mark near the bottom right above “#001”. Make the final look like a premium founder poster inspired by football rising-star graphics: energetic, aspirational, polished, and print-ready.
